title: daphne trichotoma subsp. techinensis
intro: Daphne trichotoma subsp. techinensis, also known as the Chinese daphne or Daphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. Its health benefits include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating digestive problems, like diarrhea and dysentery. Daphne trichotoma subsp. techinensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies, such as tinctures and infusions, to promote overall well-being.
